title: Delhi HC slams WFI for denying Vinesh Phogat a chance to participate in the Asian Games trials
description: WFI revised selection criteria to exclude wrestlers without 2025 or 2026 medals, termed Ms. Phogat’s 2024 Olympics disqualification a “national shame”, provoking the court’s ire; Ms. Phogat has not competed since December 2024, and had a baby in July 2025
